title: Hearty Beef Stew
description: A comforting, slow-cooked stew perfect for a chilly evening. This recipe serves a crowd and is packed with tender beef and hearty vegetables.
instructions: Brown the beef in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Remove the browned beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onions to the pot and cook until they're softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the warmed beef broth, tomato paste, and thyme.
Return the browned beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and discard the bay leaf.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
